languages.text: {n}Женщина поднимает на вас пораженный взгляд. Впрочем, огня в глазах хватает на долю секунды, и она снова теряет к вам и всему происходящему вокруг интерес.{/n}
{n}The woman raises her startled gaze to you. However, the fire in her eyes lasts only a split second before she once again loses interest in you and everything going on around her.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Женщина поднимает на вас пораженный взгляд. Впрочем, огня в глазах хватает на долю секунды, и она снова теряет к вам и всему происходящему вокруг интерес.{/n}

{n}The woman raises her startled gaze to you. However, the fire in her eyes lasts only a split second before she once again loses interest in you and everything going on around her.{/n}
{n}The woman raises her startled gaze to you. However, the fire in her eyes lasts only a split second before she once again loses interest in you and everything going on around her.{/n}

languages.text: {n}その女性は驚いた表情であなたを見上げた。しかし、彼女の目は一瞬で火を消し、再びあなたや周囲の出来事に興味を失った。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman raises her startled gaze to you. However, the fire in her eyes lasts only a split second before she once again loses interest in you and everything going on around her.{/n}

traits.locale_text: その女性は驚いた表情であなたを見上げた。しかし、彼女の目は一瞬で火を消し、再びあなたや周囲の出来事に興味を失った。

languages.text: {n}Kadın, irkilmiş bakışlarını sana kaldırıyor. Ancak gözlerindeki ateş, saniyenin onda biri kadar sürüyor. Sonrasında sana ve etrafında olup biten her şeye olan ilgisini bir kez daha kaybediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman raises her startled gaze to you. However, the fire in her eyes lasts only a split second before she once again loses interest in you and everything going on around her.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kadın, irkilmiş bakışlarını sana kaldırıyor. Ancak gözlerindeki ateş, saniyenin onda biri kadar sürüyor. Sonrasında sana ve etrafında olup biten her şeye olan ilgisini bir kez daha kaybediyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La mujer alza su mirada incrédula hacia ti. No obstante, el fuego de sus ojos solo dura un instante. Vuelve a perder el interés en ti y en todo lo que la rodea.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman raises her startled gaze to you. However, the fire in her eyes lasts only a split second before she once again loses interest in you and everything going on around her.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La mujer alza su mirada incrédula hacia ti. No obstante, el fuego de sus ojos solo dura un instante. Vuelve a perder el interés en ti y en todo lo que la rodea.{/n}

languages.text: {n}女人惊愕地抬头看向你。然而，她眼中的光芒仅持续了一瞬，便再次对你以及周围的一切失去了兴趣。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman raises her startled gaze to you. However, the fire in her eyes lasts only a split second before she once again loses interest in you and everything going on around her.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}女人惊愕地抬头看向你。然而，她眼中的光芒仅持续了一瞬，便再次对你以及周围的一切失去了兴趣。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La femme lève les yeux vers vous, l'air stupéfait. Cependant, l'éclat dans son regard ne dure qu'une fraction de seconde avant qu'elle se désintéresse à nouveau de vous et de tout ce qui se passe autour d'elle.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman raises her startled gaze to you. However, the fire in her eyes lasts only a split second before she once again loses interest in you and everything going on around her.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La femme lève les yeux vers vous, l'air stupéfait. Cependant, l'éclat dans son regard ne dure qu'une fraction de seconde avant qu'elle se désintéresse à nouveau de vous et de tout ce qui se passe autour d'elle.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Frau blickt überrascht zu dir auf. Doch das Feuer in ihren Augen hält nur einen Sekundenbruchteil an, bevor sie wieder das Interesse an dir und allem um sie herum verliert.{/n}
